svg.text: script_agent.py · Claude LLM · slide context + tone rules
timing + file map · all narration text · loaded once at startup
during the talk · no API calls at runtime
orchestrator.py · per slide: 1. play audio 2. wait → media duration 3. advance slide
4. fire demo (if configured) 5. on last slide → Q&A mode
run_voice_qa() · TTS: "Any questions?" · awaits mic input
loop: continue until Q pressed · 3× mic timeout · exit phrase detected
messages: full Q&A history · → 3-4 sentence spoken answer
pygame plays answer aloud · loops back to mic
phase 1 pre-generates all audio/video · phase 2 orchestrates playback with zero API calls · phase 3 answers live questions with claude-opus-4-5
